macro.plain_english: Global slowdown risk is MODERATE: physical demand is contracting in China, Finland while Korea, US, Peru still expand. Inflation pressure is HIGH: prices are rising in UAE, Brazil, Chile WITH volumes falling (supply-driven — the bad kind: raises prices AND hurts growth).
